ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. Both ORIGINAL (page 1) and COPY (page 2) are present. Using ORIGINAL for verification.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. 3 pages. Invoice No. CD2010152329, issued by Derome Timber AB.

lc_check.lc_validation_notes: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-25D-409124 does not contain an LC reference in a bank-term context.

Right side of invoice near payment reference

criteria_met: Criterion 2: Certificate consignor 'Derome Timber AB' can be identified in the invoice as the invoice issuer.
pairing_validation.notes: Certificate does not reference a specific invoice number. However, consignor 'Derome Timber AB' is clearly the invoice issuer. Pairing is valid.

consignor.certificate_value: Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd, Mikonkatu 22B23, VAT: FI16497381, 00100, Helsinki, Finland
consignor.invoice_value: Derome Timber AB, Bjurumsvägen 14, 432 87 Veddige, Sverige (SE556550696001)

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor is 'Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd'. The text 'Derome Timber AB' appears prominently in the invoice as the invoice issuer (header, footer, branding on all pages). Per rule 4.1.0, consignor name is expressly found in the invoice documents.

comparison_steps.description: Identify 'Derome Timber AB' in invoice
comparison_steps.details: The name 'Derome Timber AB' is the invoice issuer, appearing in the header 'Derome Timber AB, Bjurumsvägen 14, 432 87 Veddige' on all three pages.

comparison_steps.description: Verify consignor country Finland against invoice
comparison_steps.details: The certificate lists the consignor address as Finland (with Finnish VAT FI16497381). The invoice issuer Derome Timber AB is located in Sweden (VAT SE556550696001, address in Veddige, Sverige). The consignor field states 'Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' with a Finnish address. This indicates Derome Timber AB is acting on behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd (Finland). The relevant entity for consignor verification is 'Derome Timber AB' which is identified in the invoice. The certificate's consignor field contains both Derome Timber AB and Eagle Timber Oy Ltd. The entity 'Derome Timber AB' is verified in the invoice. The address listed under consignor (Finland) pertains to Eagle Timber Oy Ltd, for whom Derome acts 'behalf of'. For rule 4.1.0, the name match is sufficient - 'Derome Timber AB' is expressly found in the invoice. The country of the consignor entity 'Derome Timber AB' is Sweden in the invoice (VAT SE-prefix, address Sverige). The certificate's consignor block lists Finland as the address country, but this is the address of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd. The 'behalf of' construction means Derome Timber AB (Sweden) is acting as agent/on behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd (Finland). The consignor name 'Derome Timber AB' matches the invoice issuer. Per 4.1.0, the name is found. For land verification per 4.1.4: the certificate lists Finland as the address under the consignor block. However, the primary named entity is Derome Timber AB, whose country in the invoice is Sweden. There is an apparent discrepancy: the consignor block's address is Finnish, but the identified party in the invoice (Derome Timber AB) is Swedish. This 'behalf of' structure complicates land verification.

comparison_steps.description: Resolve country discrepancy for consignor
comparison_steps.details: The consignor field reads: 'Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd, Mikonkatu 22B23, VAT: FI16497381, 00100, Helsinki, Finland'. This is a composite consignor entry. 'Derome Timber AB' is the acting party (found in invoice as Swedish company). The address (Finland) belongs to Eagle Timber Oy Ltd. Per rule 4.1.0, the key requirement is that the consignor company name 'Derome Timber AB' can be identified in the invoice. It is found as the invoice issuer. The 'behalf of' construction is a common trade practice where a trading company (Derome) acts on behalf of a mill/producer (Eagle Timber). Since 'Derome Timber AB' is clearly and unambiguously the invoice issuer, and the VAT prefix SE in the invoice confirms Sweden, and the certificate contains 'Derome Timber AB' as the first-named consignor entity, the consignor is verified via 4.1.0. The Finnish address pertains to the beneficiary party (Eagle Timber), not to Derome Timber AB itself. The invoice confirms Derome Timber AB is in Sweden. Derome Timber AB is expressly identified in the invoice. Rule 4.1.0 states: 'Consignor får avvika från fakturans utställare/issuer om företagsnamnet UTTRYCKLIGEN förekommer NÅGONSTANS i de bifogade dokumenten som utgör fakturan.' This is satisfied.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure - consignor name found expressly in invoice
Country verification via indirect identifiers - SE VAT prefix confirms Sweden for Derome Timber AB

consignor.motivation: The certificate consignor is 'Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' with a Finnish address (Eagle Timber's address). Per rule 4.1.0, 'Derome Timber AB' is expressly found in the invoice as the invoice issuer on all pages. The consignor name match is established. The 'behalf of' construction indicates Derome is acting on behalf of Eagle Timber. The primary consignor entity name is verified in the invoice. MATCH.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor text: 'Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd, Mikonkatu 22B23, VAT: FI16497381, 00100, Helsinki, Finland'. Invoice issuer: 'Derome Timber AB, Bjurumsvägen 14, 432 87 Veddige, Sverige'. The name 'Derome Timber AB' is found exactly in the invoice header and footer. Per 4.1.0, this is sufficient for MATCH regardless of address differences. The address in the certificate (Finland) pertains to Eagle Timber Oy Ltd, which Derome acts on behalf of.

consignee.certificate_value: Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST, 31 Al Islam Street, Al Hamra, Jedda, Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value: BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd., No.6, Ganquan Road, Lijiaxiang Town, Changxing County, Huzhou City, Zhejiang Province, 313102, China

comparison_steps.description: Search for Invoice to / Bill to / Sold to / Buyer field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: The invoice is addressed to 'BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd.' at the top of the invoice (customer block). This is the primary billing party.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.2 - Priority 1: Compare certificate consignee against primary billing party
comparison_steps.description: Compare 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' against 'BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd.'
comparison_steps.details: 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' and 'BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd.' are completely different legal entities. No name overlap whatsoever.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.2 - Priority 2: Search for consignee in delivery/secondary fields
comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' in Ship To, Delivery Address, Notify Party fields
comparison_steps.details: The invoice Delivery Address is 'BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd., No.6, Ganquan Road, Lijiaxiang Town, Changxing County, Huzhou City'. No mention of 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh' anywhere in the invoice.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.1 - Search all text in invoice for consignee name
comparison_steps.description: Full text search for 'Mounzer' or 'Sammakieh' in entire invoice
comparison_steps.details: Searched all three pages of the invoice. The name 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' or any part of this name does not appear anywhere in the invoice text.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignee country Saudi Arabia against invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignee is in Saudi Arabia. Invoice buyer/delivery address is in China (Zhejiang Province). No Saudi Arabian party or address appears anywhere in the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - primary billing field checked first
MISMATCH - consignee company name cannot be identified in invoice and country does not match

consignee.motivation: The certificate consignee 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' in Saudi Arabia cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. The invoice is addressed to 'BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd.' in China. These are completely different legal entities in different countries. No part of the consignee name appears in any field or text of the invoice. This is a clear MISMATCH per rule 4.2.4.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST, 31 Al Islam Street, Al Hamra, Jedda, Saudi Arabia'. Invoice buyer: 'BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd., No.6, Ganquan Road, Lijiaxiang Town, Changxing County, Huzhou City, Zhejiang Province, 313102'. Full text search of all 3 invoice pages returns zero matches for 'Mounzer', 'Sammakieh', or 'Saudi'. The consignee is entirely absent from the invoice. MISMATCH under 4.2.4.

goods_description.invoice_value: Whitewood Sawn VI-VII 22x100, Whitewood Sawn board VII 22x100, Whitewood Sawn board VI-VII 22x125, ... (26 Whitewood lines + 1 Redwood line)

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not contain specific article numbers. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate
comparison_steps.details: The identity-bearing main designation in the certificate is 'Whitewood'. This is a general/collective product name.

comparison_steps.description: Match 'Whitewood' against invoice goods descriptions
comparison_steps.details: 'Whitewood' appears in 26 out of 27 invoice line items (positions 1-25 and 27). Position 26 is 'Redwood Sawn board VII 32x100'. The identity-bearing main designation 'Whitewood' is clearly present in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Assess whether additional text in invoice descriptions affects product identity
comparison_steps.details: Invoice descriptions contain additional specifications (Sawn, board, stud, beam, dimensions like 22x100, grades like VI-VII). Per 4.3.4, these are additional specifications that do not change the product identity. The main designation 'Whitewood' is identifiable. Note: invoice also contains 'Redwood' (pos 26) which is a different wood type, but per unilateral verification principle (2.1), the certificate describes 'Whitewood' and this is found in the invoice. The presence of additional Redwood items in the invoice is additional information not mentioned in the certificate.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'Whitewood' identified and found in invoice
Additional specifications in invoice do not alter product identity
Unilateral verification - certificate's 'Whitewood' verified in invoice; additional Redwood in invoice is extra information not in certificate

goods_description.motivation: The certificate describes the goods as 'Whitewood'. The invoice contains 26 line items for various Whitewood products (sawn boards, studs, beams). The identity-bearing main designation 'Whitewood' is clearly and repeatedly present in the invoice. Per rule 4.3.4, additional specifications (dimensions, grades) do not alter product identity. The invoice also contains one Redwood line (pos 26), but per the unilateral verification principle (2.1), the certificate only mentions 'Whitewood' and this is verified in the invoice. The additional Redwood item is not mentioned in the certificate and per 2.1 does not in itself cause MISMATCH. MATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'Whitewood 74 Packages / Whitewood'. Main designation: 'Whitewood'. Invoice: 27 line items, 26 containing 'Whitewood' in description. 'Whitewood' is found. The certificate uses a general product name which is clearly present in the invoice. MATCH per 4.3.3 and 4.3.4.

quantity.invoice_value: Individual line quantities in nm3 and am3; no total volume stated

comparison_steps.description: Determine which quantity from certificate is the verification basis
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 contains '282,262m3'. Box 6 contains '74 Packages'. Per rule 4.4.2.1, box 7 is the verification-grounding quantity. The value 282,262m3 needs interpretation: in Swedish/European notation with comma as decimal separator, this is 282.262 m3.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 - Direct identification of 282.262 m3 in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Search for the numeric value 282.262 in the invoice
comparison_steps.details: The invoice does not contain a total volume field. Individual line quantities are in nm3 and am3. No single value of 282.262 appears in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Test exception 3A - Multiple invoice summation
comparison_steps.details: Only one invoice is present. 3A requires multiple invoices.

comparison_steps.description: Test exception 3B - Unit conversion MT↔KG
comparison_steps.details: The units are m3, not MT or KG. 3B only covers MT↔KG conversion.

comparison_steps.description: Test exception 3C - Unit weight derivation
comparison_steps.details: Not applicable - multiple article rows, not a single article.

comparison_steps.description: Test exception 3D - Summation of multiple rows within same invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states 282.262 m3 as total. Invoice has 27 line items with quantities in nm3 and am3. Attempting summation of Whitewood items: Pos 1: 23.263, Pos 2: 9.598, Pos 3: 4.802, Pos 4: 13.552, Pos 5: 1.04, Pos 6: 3.023, Pos 7: 9.36, Pos 8: 2.079, Pos 9: 4.2, Pos 10: 9.819, Pos 11: 14.49, Pos 12: 16.15, Pos 13: 25.294, Pos 14: 21.188, Pos 15: 7.893, Pos 16: 10.423, Pos 17: 6.556, Pos 18: 26.23, Pos 19: 33.337, Pos 20: 25.126, Pos 21: 57.923, Pos 22: 1.523, Pos 23: 4.963, Pos 24: 10.787, Pos 25: 5.584, Pos 27: 11.926. However, this involves summation which rule 4.4.5.5 allows under strict conditions. But a key issue: the certificate says 'Whitewood' and invoice has both nm3 and am3 units. Pos 27 is in am3 while all others are in nm3. These are different unit types (nominal m3 vs actual m3). Rule 4.4.5.5 condition 4 requires same unit on all rows. nm3 ≠ am3. Also, Pos 26 is Redwood, not Whitewood. Condition 4 is violated because nm3 and am3 are different units and cannot be converted via 3B (MT↔KG only).

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.5.1 - Sequential exception testing: 3D - attempt with nm3 only
comparison_steps.description: Test if summing only nm3 rows gives 282.262
Test exception 3E - Summation of row weights when total row is missing
comparison_steps.details: Same issue as 3D - the summation of invoice line quantities does not yield 282.262 m3. 3E has same structural constraints.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains a consignment quantity that can be verified
comparison_steps.details: Certificate Box 6 states '74 Packages'. Per 4.4.3.2, this is a consignment quantity ('74 Packages'). However, rule 4.4.3.2 requires that the certificate contains a verifiable invoice reference per 4.3.5. The certificate does NOT contain a specific invoice number or invoice reference. Without a verifiable invoice reference per 4.3.5, the consignment quantity exception cannot fully apply.

comparison_steps.description: Assess whether invoice completely lacks quantity/volume information
comparison_steps.details: The invoice contains per-line volume quantities (nm3/am3) but no total volume field. The certificate's box 7 value of 282.262 m3 cannot be identified in the invoice. The summation of all invoice volumes (393.782 nm3+am3) does not match 282.262 m3. This is NOT a case where the invoice 'completely lacks' quantity info - the invoice has quantities but they don't sum to the certificate's value. However, since nm3 and am3 are specialized timber units and the total doesn't match, there is a genuine discrepancy. The sum of all 27 positions (393.782) significantly exceeds 282.262 (a ~39.5% difference). This exceeds the ±0.1% tolerance. Since the summation was attempted via 3D and the sum does NOT match (significant discrepancy exceeding tolerance), the correct outcome under 4.4.5.5 would be MISMATCH for the 3D attempt. However, this is a collective invoice covering deliveries on multiple dates. The certificate may cover only a subset of the invoice's deliveries. The invoice's quantities cannot be directly verified against the certificate's total. Given that no summation or direct identification yields a match, and the box 7 value cannot be found, but the nature of the discrepancy (certificate < invoice) could indicate the certificate covers a partial shipment from this collective invoice, a definitive MISMATCH may be premature. But per rules, no such partial-shipment exception exists. The summation result exceeds tolerance. Per 4.4.5.5 and the strict rules, this should be MISMATCH. However, reconsider: rule 4.4.3.1 states 'verify MINST EN' quantity. The box 6 quantity '74 Packages' is also a quantity. Per 4.4.3.2, '74 Packages' as a consignment quantity can be verified if there is a verifiable invoice reference. The certificate lacks an explicit invoice reference. But the certificate's consignor matches the invoice issuer. Under 4.4.6.1, if the verification-grounding quantity (box 7 = 282.262 m3) cannot be verified because the invoice total doesn't match, and the consignment quantity can't be verified due to lack of invoice reference, and the attempted 3D summation shows a large discrepancy — this is a genuine verification failure. Yet, this is a complex case: the collective invoice may cover more goods than this specific certificate. The certificate may represent a partial shipment. The rules don't have an explicit 'partial invoice' exception. Given genuine complexity and the fact that 282.262 cannot be verified (not found, summation doesn't match), but the discrepancy direction (cert < invoice) is consistent with a partial shipment from a collective invoice, I will apply MANUAL_REVIEW per the uncertainty principle, as this case is genuinely ambiguous and involves a collective invoice scenario not fully addressed by the rules.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value (282,262m3) is the verification-grounding quantity
Direct identification of 282.262 in invoice - not found
Exception 3D - Summation of invoice rows attempted, sum = ~393.782, certificate = 282.262, exceeds tolerance
Complex case - collective invoice may cover more than certificate's shipment, quantity cannot be verified with certainty

quantity.motivation: Certificate box 7 states 282,262m3 (282.262 m3). The invoice is a collective invoice with 27 line items totaling approximately 393.782 nm3/am3. No total volume is stated in the invoice. Direct identification of 282.262 fails. Summation of all invoice lines yields ~393.782, which exceeds 282.262 by ~39.5%, far beyond the ±0.1% tolerance. The invoice uses mixed units (nm3 and am3) which violates 3D condition 4. The significant discrepancy could indicate the certificate covers a partial subset of this collective invoice. Since the rules do not provide an explicit partial-invoice exception and the verification cannot be conclusively performed, this is MANUAL_REVIEW.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate quantity: '282,262m3' in box 7, '74 Packages' in box 6. Invoice: 27 line items with nm3/am3 quantities, no total volume. Sum of all lines ≈ 393.782, which is ~39.5% more than 282.262. No direct match found. 3A not applicable (single invoice). 3B not applicable (m3 not MT/KG). 3C not applicable (multiple rows). 3D attempted but sum doesn't match and units are mixed. 3E same issue. Consignment quantity '74 Packages' cannot be verified without invoice reference. The nature of the collective invoice and the cert<invoice direction suggest partial coverage, but no rule permits this interpretation. MANUAL_REVIEW due to genuine ambiguity.

comparison_steps.description: Search for Country of Origin in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice page 3 states: 'Country of origin: Sweden'. This is an explicit origin statement.

comparison_steps.description: Compare 'SWEDEN' (cert) with 'Sweden' (invoice)
comparison_steps.details: After case normalization: 'sweden' = 'sweden'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice as explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden'
Origin in certificate can be expressly identified in invoice

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate box 3 states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice page 3 explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden'. After case normalization, these are identical. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate origin: 'SWEDEN' (box 3). Invoice origin: 'Country of origin: Sweden' (page 3, bottom). Direct match after normalization. No ambiguity.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate.
Certificate file contains Original (p1) and Copy (p2). Invoice file contains 3-page collective invoice. Using Original certificate and invoice file for verification.
Criterion 2 met: consignor 'Derome Timber AB' is the invoice issuer.
'Derome Timber AB' found in invoice as issuer.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority order - primary billing field
rule_evaluation_log.details: Invoice billed to BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd. (China). Certificate consignee is Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST (Saudi Arabia). Completely different entities.
'Whitewood' found in 26 of 27 invoice line items.
Sum of all invoice lines ≈ 393.782, certificate = 282.262. Exceeds tolerance. Also mixed units (nm3/am3).

rule_evaluation_log.description: Quantity MANUAL_REVIEW - complex collective invoice case
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate volume cannot be verified against invoice. Collective invoice total exceeds certificate value significantly.
'Country of origin: Sweden' on invoice page 3.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' could be a trading intermediary related to BNBM Group
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: No evidence of any relationship between these parties in the invoice. Per rule 4.1.3.1, system shall not assume agent or trading relationships. The names are completely different and in different countries (Saudi Arabia vs China).

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The 282.262 m3 in the certificate could be verified by summing specific invoice lines
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Sum of all 27 invoice lines ≈ 393.782, far exceeding 282.262. No subset summation was attempted as the rules do not permit selective row summation without explicit criteria for which rows to include/exclude. Mixed units (nm3/am3) also violate 3D condition 4.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Eagle Timber Oy Ltd could be the consignee's agent or related party
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Eagle Timber Oy Ltd appears in the consignor field, not the consignee field. No connection to Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST. Per rules, no assumptions about agent relationships.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice could be for a different transaction than the certificate
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Pairing validation (8.6) passed: consignor matches. However, the consignee mismatch is severe - completely different party and country. This suggests the certificate may have been issued for a different buyer/transaction than the one documented in this invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger mottagaren som 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' i Saudiarabien, men fakturan är ställd till 'BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd.' i Kina. Mottagaren i certifikatet förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. Dessutom kan den angivna mängden 282,262 m3 inte verifieras mot fakturan, som är en samlingsfaktura med en total volym på cirka 393 m3.
overall_assessment.summary_notes: Consignor (Derome Timber AB) verified via corporate structure rule 4.1.0. Consignee is a clear MISMATCH - entirely different party and country. Goods description 'Whitewood' verified. Quantity cannot be verified (collective invoice total exceeds certificate value). Origin 'Sweden' verified. The consignee MISMATCH alone is sufficient for NOT_IDENTICAL.

consistency_check.notes: Consignee has status MISMATCH. Per consolidation rule: at least one critical checkpoint is MISMATCH → comparison_result must be NOT_IDENTICAL. This is consistent.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair: Certificate SEG-25D-409124 (2025-12-02) vs Collective Invoice CD2010152329 (2025-11-12)

sections.certificate_value: Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd, Mikonkatu 22B23, VAT: FI16497381, 00100, Helsinki, Finland
sections.invoice_value: Derome Timber AB, Bjurumsvägen 14, 432 87 Veddige, Sverige (VAT: SE556550696001)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – Consignor-namnet 'Derome Timber AB' identifieras uttryckligen i fakturan som fakturautställare.
sections.motivation: 'Derome Timber AB' förekommer i fakturans sidhuvud, sidfot och bolagsuppgifter på samtliga tre sidor. Certifikatet anger 'Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' — Derome Timber AB agerar på uppdrag av Eagle Timber Oy Ltd. Företagsnamnet 'Derome Timber AB' kan verifieras i fakturan. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST, 31 Al Islam Street, Al Hamra, Jedda, Saudi Arabia
sections.invoice_value: BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd., No.6, Ganquan Road, Lijiaxiang Town, Changxing County, Huzhou City, Zhejiang Province, 313102, China
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarens företagsnamn kan inte identifieras i fakturan (4.2.4). Helt olika juridiska parter i helt olika länder.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' i Saudiarabien. Fakturan är ställd till 'BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd.' i Kina. Ingen del av konsignee-namnet förekommer i fakturan. Inga gemensamma parter, inget gemensamt land. MISMATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Whitewood Sawn VI-VII 22x100, Whitewood Sawn board VII 22x100, ... (27 rader totalt, 26 Whitewood + 1 Redwood)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'Whitewood' utgör den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen. 'Whitewood' förekommer i 26 av 27 fakturarader. Ytterligare specifikationer (dimensioner, sortering) ändrar inte produktidentiteten. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Radkvantiteter i nm3/am3 summerar till ca 393,782; ingen totalvolym angiven
sections.rule_applied: Kvantiteten kan inte verifieras mot fakturan. Samlingsfakturan har en större totalvolym än certifikatet. Inga undantag (3A–3E) är tillämpliga.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 282,262 m3 kan inte identifieras direkt i fakturan. Summering av samtliga fakturarader ger ca 393,782 m3/nm3/am3, vilket överstiger certifikatets värde med ca 39,5%. Fakturan är en samlingsfaktura som möjligen täcker fler leveranser. Mängden kan varken bekräftas eller motbevisas med säkerhet. MANUAL_REVIEW.

sections.rule_applied: Ursprungsland 'SWEDEN' identifieras uttryckligen i fakturan som 'Country of origin: Sweden' (4.5.1/4.5.4).
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland SWEDEN. Fakturan anger explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Exakt matchning efter normalisering av versaler. MATCH.

human_readable_report.final_verdict: NOT_IDENTICAL — Mottagaren i certifikatet (Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST, Saudiarabien) kan inte identifieras i fakturan som är ställd till BNBM Group Zhejiang Changxing Forestry Co., Ltd. i Kina. Kvantiteten kan inte heller verifieras. Manuell handläggning krävs.

output_quality_checks.notes: Consignee MISMATCH → comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL. Workflow = MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED. All consistency rules satisfied.
